summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-11 through REQ-14) with good coverage. The backend Motoko model is updated with paidAmount and balanceAmount fields, createInvoice accepts optional paidAmount, migration module handles existing invoices, and all frontend pages (Create Invoice, Invoice Detail, Invoice List, Dashboard) are updated accordingly. Minor gaps exist around the Invoice List Balance Due column visibility and printable layout completeness, but overall the implementation appears solid.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate migration.mo module was added as a new file
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint states all Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor. The migration module is implemented as a separate file (backend/migration.mo), which may violate this constraint.
